occupation: Chief of Staff at Multiply Media Group
headline: Chief Of Staff
summary: My focus is on driving strategic growth and operational excellence, leveraging over two decades of experience in business development and outdoor advertising. My expertise in project management and commercial planning has been instrumental in launching profitable full-service consultancy practices and with a steadfast commitment to change management, I am dedicated to delivering sustainable value and transformative results.
location_str: Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates

experiences.title: Executive Growth & Operations Director
experiences.location: Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates

experiences.title: Head of MENA & Asia Partnerships
experiences.description: Managing direct relationships with key stakeholders in the OOH planning & buying chain, with principal focus on most important global brands and advertisers within the MENA and Asia regions.

experiences.title: Head of MENA
experiences.description: Providing turn-key consultancy services to clients in the MENA region, including existing OOH entities and local government/municipalities. Management of P&L, tender and team coordination. Main projects in; UAE, KSA, Bahrain, Jordan, Qatar, Oman, Syria, Egypt, Morocco, Algeria, Tunisia.

experiences.title: Marketing & Communications Manager
experiences.description: From regional HQ Dubai, responsible for the management of local MarComms team, servicing the branch offices in Abu Dhabi, Bahrain, Doha, Kuwait and Oman.

experiences.title: Client Services Manager
experiences.description: Responsible for the Financial Services, Luxury & Fashion and Telecoms accounts.

experiences.title: Project and Feature Coordinator
experiences.description: Full-time assignments in Greece, Mauritania, Ivory Coast, Tanzania, Ghana, Lithuania, Estonia, Slovenia, Poland and Barbados, International advertising sales/editorial development for ‘The Times’ and the ‘Washington Post’.  Face to face presentations/negotiations with Royalty, Presidents, PMs, Ministers, Ambassadors and bank/industry CEO’s.

education.school: Stanford University Graduate School of Business
